transfer_rules: Transfer only pacing, camera grammar, blocking and reveal order.
Do not transfer the source performers, wardrobe, vehicle branding, logos or dialogue.

visual_bible.world: real Mediterranean hotel motor court at blue hour; charcoal concrete, warm limestone arches, cool fluorescent ceiling strips, unbranded charcoal vintage coupe
continuity: Keep each character face, hair, suit palette and product combination unchanged.
Keep jewelry rigid and recognizable; no morphing or added pieces.
Use one primary camera move and one visible action per four-second shot.

cast.identity_lock: thin unbranded gold wire-frame glasses; pearl glasses chain visibly attached to both temples, not a necklace

shots.source_function: lead performer holds the frame beside vehicle before the ensemble reveal
shots.camera_contract: 50mm chest-height frame; controlled 3% slider drift left-to-right; end at the same three-quarter pose
shots.motion_contract: 0-1s inhale and hold eye contact; 1-3s shift weight once toward the coupe; 3-4s earrings make one tiny settle and stop
shots.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧，锁定角色 A 的脸、黑色西装、金贝水滴耳环、紫色宝石手镯、黑珍珠颈链，以及蓝调地中海酒店车库和无品牌深灰复古轿车。4 秒单镜头，保持 50mm 胸口高度三分之二身构图，摄影机只做不超过 3% 的极慢横向滑轨。0-1 秒她吸气并保持直视镜头；1-3 秒身体只向车身轻微移重一次；3-4 秒完全停稳，耳环只因头部极小移动摆动一次后静止。首饰结构、脸、发型、服装、车库与车体不得变化。不要换脸、不要新增首饰或人物，不要文字、logo、包、杯子、桌子、花、音乐。环境声仅远处空调低鸣与非常轻的鞋跟摩擦声。

shots.source_function: glasses close-up replaces the source glasses-character stare
shots.camera_contract: 85mm locked chest-up portrait; focus stays on both glasses temples and pearl chain
shots.motion_contract: 0-2s direct gaze; 2-3s thumb and forefinger release the blazer edge; 3-4s pearl chain makes one short gravity-driven swing then rests
shots.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧，锁定角色 C 的雀斑红发、细金属框眼镜、两侧都连接在镜腿上的珍珠眼镜链、巴洛克珍珠耳环、玉珠手链与深灰西装。4 秒单镜头，保持 85mm 胸上近景，摄影机完全锁定，焦点始终清楚覆盖双侧镜腿连接点与珍珠眼镜链。0-2 秒她透过镜片直视镜头；2-3 秒右手从西装翻领轻轻松开；3-4 秒眼镜链受重力只轻摆一次然后停住。眼镜链不是项链，必须连接在两侧镜腿；不换脸、不加首饰、不加人或道具，不要文字、logo、音乐。环境声只有远处车库风声。

shots.camera_contract: 35mm low camera from hip height; slow 4% forward tracking; retain open polished floor foreground
shots.motion_contract: 0-2.5s take two measured steps from the arch; 2.5-3.2s stop with one shoulder leading; 3.2-4s hold still
shots.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧，锁定角色 D 的低髻、奶油色西装、白贝三连耳环、贝壳扭纹珍珠手镯和珍珠坠颈链，以及蓝调车库空间。4 秒单镜头，保持 35mm 低机位全身构图，摄影机只做不超过 4% 的慢速前移，保留前景地面反光。0-2.5 秒她从暖色石灰岩拱门方向向镜头走两步；2.5-3.2 秒在画面右侧停下，右肩略向前；3.2-4 秒完全停稳。耳环与手镯只做符合步伐的一次小幅惯性摆动。脸、首饰结构、服装与空间不可变化；不要新增人物、车标、文字、logo、道具或音乐。

shots.camera_contract: 35mm low wide shot; locked camera; preserve all four full bodies and their spacing
shots.motion_contract: 0-2s all four hold gaze; 2-3s only A shifts her front foot and C's glasses chain settles; 3-4s everyone locks into the final tableau
shots.seedance_prompt_zh: @图片1 是首帧，锁定四位模特的位置、脸、服装与各自首饰组合：左侧 B 的白色西装和珍珠簇耳环、第二位 A 的黑色西装和金贝耳环、第三位 C 的眼镜与珍珠眼镜链、右侧 D 的奶油色西装与白贝三连耳环。4 秒单镜头，保持 35mm 低机位全身群像，摄影机完全锁定，四人之间的距离和深灰无品牌复古轿车位置不能变化。0-2 秒四人保持看向镜头；2-3 秒只允许 A 轻移前脚，C 的眼镜链微小摆动一次；3-4 秒全员停成最终群像。不得换脸、串换首饰或新增人物、首饰、车标、文字、logo、道具。不要音乐，环境声仅为远处车库空气声。

edit_contracts: S1 03.4s -> S2 00.0s: hard cut on A's eye contact; carry a quiet fluorescent hum as a J-cut.
S2 03.6s -> S3 00.0s: hard cut on the pearl-chain settle; retain the warm arch tone for six frames.
S3 03.5s -> S4 00.0s: match cut from D's stopped stance to the group tableau; add one soft heel-click at the cut.

budget.recommended_retry_policy: Approve a shot if identity, product geometry and the single action are stable. Retry one variable only; cap at one retry per shot.
